modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help setting up Google Voice and sending texts.

full_description_text:  
I'm trying to get my Google Voice account set up, but I'm having some trouble. I can't seem to send texts through it, and it's really frustrating. I just need a little help to figure this out, please!
short_description: Need help setting up Google Voice and sending texts.
description: I'm trying to get my Google Voice account set up, but I'm having some trouble. I can't seem to send texts through it, and it's really frustrating. I just need a little help to figure this out, please!
